title: Warning Signs For The AI Boom, Anthropic Passes OpenAI, Robinhood’s AI Trading
summary: Alex Kantrowitz and Ranjan Roy discuss warning signs in the AI boom, including companies reconsidering AI spend due to exploding token consumption, concerns that only 18% of tokens fund shipping products, and suspected over-investment driven by unrestricted token usage. They also cover Anthropic surpassing OpenAI in valuation and emerging applications like AI trading.
